name: Perfect Par Golf Studio
about: Perfect Par Golf Studio is a private, single-bay luxury golf simulator venue in Los Angeles. It is exclusively available to members and is designed to provide a private, high-quality experience without the constraints of traditional driving ranges. The studio is equipped with a Foresight Falcon simulator with Focus AI technology, a Puttview P7 Putting Green, and amenities such as a coffee bar, member lounge, and a professional workstation. Memberships are offered on a monthly basis with a package of 10 hours of private studio access.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Foresight Falcon simulator provides comprehensive swing data
Private single-bay environment ensures a distraction-free experience
Flexible monthly memberships with the ability to cancel anytime
Professional workstation available for members who want to WFH

food_and_drink.notes: Complimentary coffee bar and snacks provided; members may bring their own snacks and beverages but are not allowed in the sim bay or on the putting green.
No alcohol is mentioned on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Utilizes advanced dual-camera technology with Focus AI technology for personalized training recommendations.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if members must bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Members may bring snacks and beverages, but there is a strict no food and beverage policy within the simulator bay itself and on the Puttview P7 putting green. Complimentary coffee and snacks are provided in the member lounge.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention if children are allowed or if the venue is catered towards a family-friendly environment.
